title: Jamaican Pear Crumble
description: A sweet and tangy dessert featuring tender Jamaican pears topped with a crunchy oat and butter crumble.
instructions: Peel, core, and slice the Jamaican pears into 1-inch pieces.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the sliced pears, brown sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt. Toss until the pears are evenly coated.
Transfer the pear mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, combine the oats, all-purpose flour, and cold butter. Use your fingers or a pastry blender to work the butter into the dry ingredients until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Spread the crumb mixture evenly over the top of the pear mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the fruit is tender.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
